template.name: Client
BootstrapHandler

plot.title: Probability Density Distribution
plot.comment: Parameters: α=0.05, ε=0.05, bucket width=1.2837, bucket count=14 Runs: 200 in total, 196 (98%) displayed, 4 (2%) remaining Span of displayed sample: [6.297, 24.27] Mean estimate of displayed sample: 15.09 ± 0.5877 (95% CI)

plot.comment: Parameters: α=0.05, ε=0.05, bucket width=1.2837, bucket count=14 Runs: 200 in total, 196 (98%) displayed, 4 (2%) remaining Span of displayed sample: [6.297, 24.27] Mean estimate of displayed sample: 15.09 ± 0.5877 (95% CI)
